svg.title: Before and after using PDD
svg.desc: A comparison between a generic agent workflow and a PDD workflow.

g.text: 1. User asks for a product or code change
2. Agent writes a broad plan and starts editing
3. Scope, privacy, or release issues appear late
4. User asks for rollback, split commit, or redo
